name: Spaghetti Chitarra Parmigiana
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small, heavy skillet over medium heat, heat one tablespoon olive oil. Add butter and stir until melted.
2. Add sliced mushrooms to the skillet. Cook for about two minutes or until the mushrooms lose their crispiness.
3. Drain the mushrooms and set aside.
4. In a large skillet, heat the remaining olive oil and butter over medium heat.
5. Add minced garlic and cook for about two minutes.
6. Stir in the crushed chili peppers, oregano, and remaining sliced mushrooms. Cook for about 20 seconds.
7. Add cooked pasta to the skillet, salt, and pepper to taste. Toss everything together until well mixed.
8. Serve hot, sprinkled with freshly grated Parmesan cheese.
